data_source: FY2025 业绩公告 + FY2024 20-F + web search

disclosure_quirks.reported_basis: Revenue by service type: online marketing services and other vs transaction services
disclosure_quirks.economic_basis: Business model economics by domestic marketplace vs Temu / overseas fulfillment and merchant services
disclosure_quirks.why_it_matters: Transaction services revenue cannot be mechanically treated as Temu revenue or high-margin commission income because PDD does not separately disclose Temu revenue, profit, or geographic revenue.
disclosure_quirks.evidence: FY2025 transaction services revenue was RMB 214.063B, or 49.57% of total revenue; company disclosures do not provide a standalone Temu P&L.

latest_interim.source_url: PDD Holdings FY2025 fourth quarter and full-year results release
latest_interim.notes: Q4 FY2025 revenue growth is used as the latest operating slope in this report; company did not issue a separate FY2026 quarter before the report date.

notes: FY2025 财务口径来自 PDD Holdings 2026-03-25 发布的第四季度及全年未经审计业绩公告。
公司在 FY2025 业绩公告中未单列利息费用，而是披露“利息及投资收益净额”，因此利息保障倍数不宜机械计算。
资本开支未在本次业绩公告中单列，本报告按平台轻资产特征与 PP&E 变动对 capex 做近似估算。
